return False\n    if z is None: z = terrain_z(x, y)\n    a.set_actor_location(unreal.Vector(x, y, z), False, False)\n    ops.append(f\"MOVED:{label}->({x},{y},{round(z)})\")\n    return True\n\n# 7 buildings pushed to safe ring ≥2800 UU from PS(300,26)\n# Calculated distances all >2800 UU\nmove(\"Bldg_9\",   2200, -2200)   # dist~2950\nmove(\"Bldg_22\", -2900,   800)   # dist~3286\nmove(\"Bldg_48\",  3000, -2100)   # dist~3395\nmove(\"Bldg_67\", -2800, -1600)   # dist~3496\nmove(\"Bldg_84\",  2600,  2900)   # dist~3682\nmove(\"Bldg_101\",-3600,  1800)   # dist~4276\nmove(\"Bldg_115\",-2400, -3100)   # dist~3984\n\n# Bldg_35 already at (3200,-900) - re-snap Z\nmove(\"Bldg_35\",  3200,  -900)\n\n# Fog: reduce density so scene is more visible\ntry:\n    for a in eas.get_all_level_actors():\n        lbl = a.get_actor_label()\n        if \"Fog\" in lbl or \"fog\" in lbl:\n            comp = a.get_component_by_class(unreal.ExponentialHeightFogComponent)\n            if comp:\n                comp.set_editor_property(\"fog_density\", 0.02)\n                comp.set_editor_property(\"fog_inscattering_color\", unreal.LinearColor(0.5, 0.6, 0.7, 1.0))\n                ops.append(\"FOG_REDUCED\")\nexcept Exception as e:\n    ops.append(f\"FOG_ERR:{e}\")\n\nresult = {\"ops\": ops}\nwith open(\"/tmp/r4_result.json\",\"w\") as f: json.dump(result, f)\nunreal.log(f\"R4: {len(ops)} ops\")\n"}}
